violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice scoop stored outside the ice machine on a non clean surface.--Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fan covers in the walk-in dirty and require cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent hood and filters require more frequent cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors, walls, ceiling dirty and or smoke stained.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
